title: Excalibur Cursors
body:
## Excalibur Cursors No fancy cursors here - just pure **Excalibur** perfection!
A simple resource pack that uses _official_ **Excalibur** textures as cursors. ### Cursors for [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ioAbwU6c/images/64dd5db948ca50124925d303134f847ee5f85e57.png) ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ioAbwU6c/images/e5ea73f3776359968dabf41afa2cb233e4e74fdc.png)
This resource pack requires [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod. (previously known as Minecraft Cursor)
Supporting both versions 3 and 4. Textures by Sir [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew), Keeper of the Textures and Baron of Craftshire!!
--- ``` Contact & Feedback: maevius669@discord ```
